name: AI_SOC_Triage
author: SOC-AI-Analyst
description: LLM-based severity and MITRE ATT&CK triage for a TheHive case, using a local Ollama model only.

configurationItems.name: thehive_url
configurationItems.description: Base URL of the TheHive instance, e.g. http://thehive:9000

configurationItems.name: thehive_apikey
configurationItems.description: TheHive API key used to fetch case details

configurationItems.name: ollama_host
configurationItems.description: Base URL of the local Ollama server

configurationItems.name: ollama_model
configurationItems.description: Ollama model tag to use for triage

configurationItems.name: ollama_timeout_seconds
configurationItems.description: Timeout for the Ollama generate call, in seconds
